parameters.subject: Application Rejected
parameters.message: =Dear {{ $('Edit Fields3').item.json.Candidate_name }},  Thank you for taking the time to apply and for your interest in joining our team.  After careful review, we regret to inform you that your application has not been selected to move forward at this time.  We truly appreciate your effort and encourage you to apply again in the future.  Wishing you all the best.  Kind regards,   HR Team
